title: Update company credentials to 5 years experience, 10+ projects completed, 20+ team size, and remove featured projects section

requirements.text: Update the About section credentials to display '5+ Years' of experience instead of '10+ Years'
acceptanceCriteria: The About section displays '5+ Years' in the experience credential card
The change is visible on the live website

requirements.text: Update the About section credentials to display '10+ Projects' completed instead of '150+ Projects'
acceptanceCriteria: The About section displays '10+ Projects' in the completed projects credential card
The description text is updated accordingly

requirements.text: Update the About section credentials to display '20+ Team' size instead of '75+ Team'
acceptanceCriteria: The About section displays '20+ Team' in the team size credential card
The team description reflects the updated size

requirements.text: Remove the entire Projects Portfolio section from the website
acceptanceCriteria: The Projects component is no longer rendered in App.tsx
The Projects section is not visible anywhere on the website
Navigation flows smoothly from Services to Government sections without the Projects section

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or job application functionality
Preserve all other sections and their content
Maintain the existing color scheme and responsive design
nonGoals: Changing the layout or styling of other components
